name: knowledge-tools
description: knowledge-tools: skills and plugins for running a personal LLM wiki.

plugins.name: vault
plugins.description: The knowledge-vault skill: capture raw material into a personal LLM wiki and query the compiled notes, through the vault's MCP connector.

plugins.name: auto-capture
plugins.description: Optional always-on skill: autonomously capture knowledge and tasks to the vault inbox during any conversation, without being asked. Requires the vault plugin for the append_to_inbox connector.
